note: multibyte, small: inlined; size is UTF-8 bytes, not codepoints
input: 日本語のテキストです。これはテストです。

expected.content: 日本語のテキストです。これはテストです。

note: multibyte, 8 KB: between the old 4 KB cap and the new 64 KB cap, so this INLINES. An implementation still gated at 4096 truncates here and fails.
multibyte, EXACTLY at the 64 KB cap in bytes (boundary inclusive → inlines). Only 32768 code units, so a char-based gate would also inline — the next case is what separates them.
multibyte, ONE codepoint past the cap in bytes → truncates. Still only 32770 code units, far under 65536, so a char-based gate wrongly inlines and fails.
3-byte characters past the cap, with distinct head/tail markers: pins that the slice is by code unit and that head/tail are taken from the right ends.
